title: Hinsdale, MT

aiSummary: This is a commercial grazing ranch with 89% of acreage under BLM or State lease—not true ownership. Seasonal-use designation and minimal deeded land (3,710 of 35,000 acres) make year-round residence and self-sufficient development impossible. The effective deeded price (~$2,700/acre) is expensive for an investment operation, not a homesteading opportunity.

aiSummary: This 30,000-acre ranch in remote Montana has creek water and strong grazing potential but lacks building infrastructure and is marketed at commercial scale ($12M). title: Trapper Creek Road, MT

At $45k/acre and with incomplete listing details, value proposition relies more on lifestyle appeal than deal quality.

title: 6031 Musselshell Trail Road, MT
